title: [BUG] Excel file lost shape after open by Exceljs
author: TranBaVinhSon
body: ## 🐛 Bug Report Lib version: 3.8.0 ## Steps To Reproduce I only open file from buffer and write to a new file but the output file lost the `shape`. Please take a look ! ```javascript const ExcelJS = require("exceljs"); // const excelFile = fs.readFileSync(filePath); // buffer async function readByExcelJs(excelFile) { const workbook = await new ExcelJS.Workbook().xlsx.load(excelFile); // load from buffer await workbook.xlsx.writeFile(`result.xlsx`); // write file return result; } ``` - input [Book1.xlsx](https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/files/4255273/Book1.xlsx) - output [6e1522c0-cfc5-4f6a-8d5b-3280e2aa73cd.xlsx](https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/files/4255278/6e1522c0-cfc5-4f6a-8d5b-3280e2aa73cd.xlsx) The problem also happens with `Text Box`. The output file doesn't contain text box. ## The expected behaviour: Output file should have `shape`, `text box`

comments.author: dinhhai96-vn
comments.body: Vấn đề này a đã giải quyết bằng ExcelJS đc chưa? Em củng đang gặp trường hợp tương tự

comments.author: kigh-ota
comments.body:
https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/pull/2077
This PR opened by DantSu seems to resolve the issue

comments.author: ijash
comments.body: It appears that there was also an issue with text boxes, and PR #2601 addressed and fixed it. However, it has been six months, and the PR has not yet been merged.
